mnemonics.title: LIFO Principle
mnemonics.content: Last In, First Out - like a stack of plates

mnemonics.title: Stack Operations
mnemonics.content: PUSH, POP, PEEK, isEmpty, isFull - the 5 core stack operations

mnemonics.title: Array-Based Stack
mnemonics.content: top = -1 means empty, top = MAX-1 means full, top++ then store for push, read then top-- for pop
